title: cyperus radians
intro: Cyperus radians, also known as the wheel grass or fan cattail, is a type of aquatic sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cyperus radians include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cyperus radians can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
